title: RUSTINS Quick Drying MDF White Primer 500ml-Quick-Drying, Smooth Finish Primer for Bare MDF Wood and Interior Surfaces; Excellent Adhesion; Seals and Prepares for Painting
features: Quick-Drying and Efficient – Rustins MDF White Primer offers a fast-drying formula that helps speed up your painting projects while delivering professional-grade surface preparation for MDF and wood
Exceptional Surface Sealing – This white primer effectively seals porous MDF surfaces, preventing paint absorption and ensuring even topcoat coverage with fewer coats and less effort

Smooth Finish for Enhanced Results – Engineered to provide a smooth and consistent base, this primer enhances the final look of your paint job by eliminating patchiness and uneven absorption; ADD TO BASKET now
Versatile Interior Use – Specifically formulated for interior MDF and bare wood applications, it works beautifully on furniture, shelves, crafts, and panelling to achieve a long-lasting finish

Good Coverage and Easy Application – This water-based MDF primer offers excellent coverage with minimal odour; it can be applied with brush or roller, making it suitable for professionals and DIYers alike
description: From the manufacturer Feature In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his shop in London's Shoreditch district where he wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. About Us Today, Rustins continues its research and development efforts on its markets of wood finishing, speciality paint and decorating. We continually bring to market product giving with advances in aware products, more good finishes and a good range of products to meet our growing international customers' wants.
